Joshua needs a new roof. Ion's in-house roofing capability was never mentioned. The closer should surface this as a combined roofing + solar opportunity.

closer_should_know: Joshua's primary stated interest is Tesla solar roof tiles — a product Ion does not sell. He described the integrated shingle product specifically ('their own shingles that are solar panels... a hub that they store energy in'). The closer must reframe Ion's actual offering (Ion panels + Tesla Powerwall battery option) before presenting the design, or the appointment will collapse on product mismatch. Separately, Joshua needs a new roof — the roofing cross-sell was never initiated on the setter call and is a live opportunity.
